---
title: "rss4 Codebook"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{rss4 codebook}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---
```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  echo = FALSE
)
```
```{r}
library(icorp26)
library(datawizard)
```




```{r}
data_codebook(rss4) |> display()
```
